creator: avatar4d@gmail.com
text:
Temporary workaround to get it installed:


Edit /etc/pkg/FreeBSD.conf

 Change 

url: "pkg+http://pkg.FreeBSD.org/${ABI}/quarterly",  

to

 url: "pkg+http://pkg.FreeBSD.org/${ABI}/release_1",


then you can pkg install deluge



NOTE: If you change the file back, don't upgrade anything until this is fixed or it will delete it again.
